name: Moist Cornbread Dressing - Slc
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cornbread crumbs and breadcrumbs in a large bowl.
2. Dissolve bouillon cubes in boiling water; pour over crumb mixture and stir well.
3. Saute celery, onion, and green pepper in butter until tender; add to crumb mixture, stirring well.
4. Brown sausage in a heavy skillet; drain. Stir sausage and remaining ingredients into cornbread mixture.
5. Spoon into a lightly greased 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch baking dish.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 45 minutes.
Yield: 8 servings.
